name: passx
description: Production-quality password manager with zero-knowledge encryption

scripts.setup: npm install && cd shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
